commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=337e904b0d75745f15e27081f34e902a33e2b057)
commands.review_summary:
The PR strips plaintext provider `apiKey` values from generated and merged `models.json`, migrates legacy catalog-only keys to `auth-profiles.json`, and adds regression coverage for stripping, migration, and fail-closed persistence.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main can preserve plaintext `apiKey` values into `models.json`, and the PR's stripped output conflicts with pi-coding-agent's custom-provider `apiKey` validation path.
commands.review_followup: Maintainer review is needed to choose the compatible non-secret catalog contract for pi and accept the fail-closed migration behavior before merge.

target.title: fix(agents): strip plaintext model provider keys
target.author: pcdqc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
